title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
